steps.name: When user is searching for product
And user added some items to cart "ITEM_1" "ITEM_2" "ITEM_3"
Then verify that the invoice updated

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Verify that the invoice updated after removing item from the cart

labels.name: suite
labels.value: Verify that the invoice updated after removing item from the cart
